channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Why Your Code Docs Fail and How to Fix Them
item.description: Most code docs fail because developers lack structured writing skills. Real-world fixes with Vale, MkDocs, and ADRs that cut onboarding time by 52%.

item.title: Bug-Free Pipelines
item.description: Prevent bugs in CI/CD pipelines with code reviews, automated testing, and continuous integration

item.title: Mobile App Security
item.description: Mobile app security vulnerabilities can compromise user data, with 75% of apps having at least one vulnerability

item.title: Code Read
item.description: Improve code reading skills with a structured approach

item.title: Skills to Abandon Before 2027
item.description: Discover the skills that will become obsolete in 5 years and learn how to stay ahead of the curve

item.title: Web Accessibility: Code, Laws, and Reality Checks
item.description: Web accessibility is a legal requirement, but many developers misunderstand or ignore it. Here's a step-by-step guide to improve the accessibility of your website.

item.title: AI Tools for Students: Study Smarter
item.description: Discover the benefits and limitations of AI tools for students, including real-world performance numbers and common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: Career Boost in 12 Months: Dev Roadmap
item.description: Boost your tech career in 12 months by following this step-by-step guide to DevOps, including tools, libraries, and real-world performance numbers.

item.title: Code Review: Giving Feedback That Improves Code
item.description: Learn how to give feedback that improves code with these actionable tips and best practices for code review. Improve your development process and deliver higher-quality code.

item.title: Building in Public: Pitfalls and Payoffs
item.description: A deep dive into the pitfalls and payoffs of building in public, including tools, platforms, and strategies for success.

item.title: How Companies Are Using AI to Cut Costs: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to How Companies Are Using AI to Cut Costs covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Tech Salaries in 2026: Who Earns What: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Tech Salaries in 2026: Who Earns What covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Data Quality: Why Your Analytics Are Lying to You: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Data Quality: Why Your Analytics Are Lying to You covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Create Your AI Butler
item.description: Build a personal AI assistant with a user-centric approach

item.title: AI Widens Wealth Gap
item.description: AI widens wealth gap, exacerbating inequality

item.title: 2026 Data Breach Disasters
item.description: 2026 data breach disasters: causes, effects, and prevention

item.title: AI Showdown: GPT vs Claude vs Gemini
item.description: GPT vs Claude vs Gemini: AI showdown

item.title: Stripe's Rise to Fame
item.description: Stripe revolutionized online payments by prioritizing developer experience. Learn how it works, common pitfalls, and the hidden tradeoffs of its simplified API.

item.title: Fine-Tuning LLMs Without a GPU: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Fine-Tuning LLMs Without a GPU covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: Tech Fail: Why Most Never Profit
item.description: Tech companies often fail to become profitable
